prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `18447a8d`.
codex_response:
Implemented ARC2 task package `18447a8d`. The rule is: split on full-width `7` separator rows; in each 3-row panel, read the left `8` prefix profile in columns `0..4`, take its width-5 complement, and fill that complement on the left using the color from the panel whose right-aligned colored profile in columns `7..10` matches it. `arc2_opus46_summary.json` was used as the valid hint; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded because its block-count rotation rule contradicts the official examples, and that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_18447a8d/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed.

Code is in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_18447a8d/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_18447a8d/generator.py#L54), and [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_18447a8d/__init__.py#L1). The generator keeps the official family structure: fixed 11-column layout, separator rows, 2-4 panels, unique non-`7`/`8` colors, and panel-to-panel complement-profile matching.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/18447a8d/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/18447a8d/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/18447a8d/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/18447a8d/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/18447a8d/previews/preview_03.png).
